justification: The diff successfully migrates javax.* to jakarta.* and updates Spring Boot to 3.x, but introduces spurious churn by removing @Autowired annotations (redundant but not harmful) and refactoring imports unnecessarily. The SecurityConfig migration is incomplete (still extends WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with a comment), and the pom.xml has a broken junit dependency (empty artifactId). The @Serial annotation on serialVersionUID is a good Java 14+ idiom.
